description: Daily AI review auto-commit (ECM Daily Review account, 06:19 UTC). Updated docs/data/daily_review.json (+7/-7) and docs/tracking.html (+3/-21). No substantive claim changes: registry still 69 confirmed / 4 refined / 10 prospective / 94.5%; live monitor still 100.0% (28/28 passed, 11 pending). Only routine field updates: generated_at timestamp, live_monitor.timestamp, eclipse_days countdown 116 -> 115, Current Kp Index observed 1.0 -> 2.0, Schumann observed text updated to reference Kp=2.0.
notes: This commit was pending at last poll (23:10Z) -- now landed. Routine daily pipeline run. Tracking.html -21 lines is cosmetic dead-space removal around the summary panel; no substantive content removed. At next poll snapshot (10:23Z) observed Kp had drifted further to 3.0, which violates the <2 (quiet) predicted threshold for the Current Kp Index domain. This is real-time geomagnetic data behavior and not a site content change.
